steps.title: Support the homogenizing claim
steps.content: Lin claims that the category "world music" wrongly treats highly distinct traditions as one group. The strongest support would show that mbaqanga and quan ho are genuinely different from each other.

steps.title: Show real distinctness
steps.content: Choice B discusses popularity, not musical similarity. Choice C discusses who performs the music now. Choice D says the two traditions are similar to each other, which weakens Lin's claim. The remaining finding shows independent development and little musical overlap. The answer is A.
